title: koeleria andreanszkyi
intro: Koeleria andreanszkyi, also known as Andreanszky's Koeleria, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Koeleria andreanszkyi include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Koeleria andreanszkyi can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
